name: imgcli-mcp
description: Convert, resize, crop, filter & composite images locally via the imgcli CLI — a tiny, no-dependency image tool. Runs on your machine so it can read and write your own files.
long_description: An MCP server that exposes imgcli (a single, no-dependency C binary) as native tools: convert_image, probe_image, and list_filters. Because it runs locally over stdio, the tools operate on real file paths on your machine. Requires the imgcli binary (brew install swperb/tap/imgcli, or build from source); if it isn't on PATH, set the binary path in the configuration below.

imgcli_bin.title: imgcli binary
imgcli_bin.description: Path to the imgcli binary. Leave as "imgcli" if it is on your PATH (e.g. after `brew install swperb/tap/imgcli`); otherwise give an absolute path.
